list.name: queue
list.label: Очередь
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT queuename FROM queue_daily ORDER BY queuename
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT queuename FROM queue_daily ORDER BY queuename

list.name: agent
list.label: Оператор
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT agent FROM queue_calls WHERE agent IS NOT NULL AND agent<>'' AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' ORDER BY agent
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT agent FROM queue_calls WHERE agent IS NOT NULL AND agent<>'' AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' ORDER BY agent

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '') AND disposition='ANSWERED'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '') AND disposition='ABANDON'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '') AND disposition IN ('ABANDON','EXITWITHTIMEOUT','EXITEMPTY')

SELECT ROUND(SUM(disposition='ANSWERED')/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)*100,1) AS value FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '')

SELECT ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, enter_ts, connect_ts)),1) AS value FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '') AND disposition='ANSWERED'

panels.title: Нагрузка по неделям (Получено / Отвечено / Неотвечено / Несост.)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE(DATE_SUB(enter_ts, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(enter_ts) DAY)) AS time,
  COUNT(*)                                                      AS `Получено`,
  SUM(disposition='ANSWERED')                                   AS `Отвечено`,
  SUM(disposition='ABANDON')                                    AS `Неотвечено`,
  SUM(disposition IN ('ABANDON','EXITWITHTIMEOUT','EXITEMPTY')) AS `Несостоявшийся`
FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '')
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT
  HOUR(enter_ts) AS `Час`,
  COUNT(*)                                                      AS `Получено`,
  SUM(disposition='ANSWERED')                                   AS `Отвечено`,
  SUM(disposition='ABANDON')                                    AS `Неотвечено`,
  SUM(disposition IN ('ABANDON','EXITWITHTIMEOUT','EXITEMPTY')) AS `Несостоявшийся`
FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '')
GROUP BY `Час` ORDER BY `Час`

SELECT
  HOUR(enter_ts) AS `Час`,
  ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, enter_ts, connect_ts)),1) AS `Ср. ожидание`,
  ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, connect_ts, end_ts)),1)   AS `Ср. разговор`
FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '')
  AND disposition='ANSWERED' AND end_ts IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY `Час` ORDER BY `Час`

SELECT
  CASE DAYOFWEEK(enter_ts)
    WHEN 2 THEN '1 Пн' WHEN 3 THEN '2 Вт' WHEN 4 THEN '3 Ср'
    WHEN 5 THEN '4 Чт' WHEN 6 THEN '5 Пт' WHEN 7 THEN '6 Сб'
    WHEN 1 THEN '7 Вс' END AS `День`,
  COUNT(*)                                                      AS `Получено`,
  SUM(disposition='ANSWERED')                                   AS `Отвечено`,
  SUM(disposition='ABANDON')                                    AS `Неотвечено`,
  SUM(disposition IN ('ABANDON','EXITWITHTIMEOUT','EXITEMPTY')) AS `Несостоявшийся`
FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '')
GROUP BY `День` ORDER BY `День`

SELECT
  CASE DAYOFWEEK(enter_ts)
    WHEN 2 THEN 'Пн' WHEN 3 THEN 'Вт' WHEN 4 THEN 'Ср'
    WHEN 5 THEN 'Чт' WHEN 6 THEN 'Пт' WHEN 7 THEN 'Сб'
    WHEN 1 THEN 'Вс' END AS `День`,
  COUNT(*)                                                     AS `Получено`,
  SUM(disposition='ANSWERED')                                  AS `Отвечено`,
  SUM(disposition='ABANDON')                                   AS `Неотвечено`,
  SUM(disposition IN ('ABANDON','EXITWITHTIMEOUT','EXITEMPTY'))AS `Несост.`,
  ROUND(SUM(disposition='ANSWERED')/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)*100,1)  AS `% Отв`,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN disposition='ANSWERED'
             THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, enter_ts, connect_ts) END),1) AS `Ср.ожид (с)`,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN disposition='ANSWERED' AND end_ts IS NOT NULL
             THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, connect_ts, end_ts) END),1)   AS `Ср.разг (с)`
FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '')
GROUP BY DAYOFWEEK(enter_ts) ORDER BY DAYOFWEEK(enter_ts)

SELECT
  agent AS `Оператор`,
  COUNT(*)                                                      AS `Получено`,
  SUM(disposition='ANSWERED')                                   AS `Отвечено`,
  SUM(disposition='ABANDON')                                    AS `Неотвечено`,
  SUM(disposition IN ('ABANDON','EXITWITHTIMEOUT','EXITEMPTY')) AS `Несост.`,
  ROUND(SUM(disposition='ANSWERED')/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0)*100,1)   AS `% Отв`,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN disposition='ANSWERED'
             THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, enter_ts, connect_ts) END),1) AS `Ср.ожид (с)`,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN disposition='ANSWERED' AND end_ts IS NOT NULL
             THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, connect_ts, end_ts) END),1)   AS `Ср.разг (с)`,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN disposition='ANSWERED' AND end_ts IS NOT NULL
             THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, connect_ts, end_ts) END)/60,1) AS `Мин разг`,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN disposition='ANSWERED' AND end_ts IS NOT NULL
             THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, enter_ts, connect_ts)
                + TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, connect_ts, end_ts) END),1)   AS `AHT (с)`
FROM queue_calls WHERE $__timeFilter(enter_ts) AND queuename LIKE '${queue:raw}' AND (agent LIKE '${agent:raw}' OR agent IS NULL OR agent = '') AND agent IS NOT NULL AND agent<>''
GROUP BY agent ORDER BY `Отвечено` DESC
